name: TECHPRECISION CORP
summary: TechPrecision Corporation, through subsidiaries Ranor and Stadco, manufactures large-scale precision fabricated and machined metal structural components for defense, aerospace, and precision industrial customers. Services include custom fabrication, CNC machining, welding, heat treating, assembly, non-destructive testing, and inspection. Products include components for U.S. Navy submarines, aircraft carriers, USMC military helicopters, and defense/aerospace programs. All operations and customers are located in the United States.

products.name: Precision Fabricated Metal Components
products.description: Large-scale welded and machined metal structural components for defense and aerospace programs.

products.name: Precision Machined Components
products.description: CNC-programmed high-precision machined parts up to 100 tons for defense and industrial customers.

products.name: Tooling, Molds, Fixtures, Jigs and Dies
products.description: Production tooling used in manufacturing defense-centric aircraft components, produced by Stadco.

products.name: Manufacturing Engineering Services
products.description: Assists customers in optimizing engineering designs for manufacturing efficiency on a build-to-print basis.

products.name: Non-Destructive Testing (NDT)
products.description: NDT inspection services including portable and fixed CMM, performed at both Ranor and Stadco facilities.
